tool_args.label: Joint LIRR / Metro-North Committee Minutes, November 2022

payload.title: Minutes of the Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Committees Tuesday, November 29, 2022

evidence_refs.source_quote: Minutes of the Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Committees Tuesday, November 29, 2022
Meeting held at 2 Broadway – 20 th Floor New York, New York 10004 9:30 am

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Representing Long Island Rail Road:
The members of the Long Island Rail Road ("LIRR") Committee met jointly
Representing Metro-North:
Susan Sarch Vice President, General Counsel & Secretary Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company
MTA Construction & Development ("C&D") President Jamie Torres Springer
MTAPD Chief of Police John Mueller
Federal Railroad Administration ("FRA") granted a waiver
Amtrak (which provided the Acela equipment and fully participated)
Catherine Rinaldi – Interim President
Catherine Rinaldi – President

payload.description: East Side Access (ESA) project to bring LIRR service to Grand Central Madison, increasing peak service by 40% and off-peak service by 65%

evidence_refs.source_quote: East Side Access ("ESA") to open on schedule
increasing peak service by 40% and off-peak service by 65%

warnings: project.routes_served is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists should become project-route relations when supported. Suggested relation: serves_route.

payload.description: Ronkonkoma Double Track system expansion completed on time in 2018

evidence_refs.source_quote: Double Track investment that was completed on time in 2018

payload.description: Third Track commissioned a few months back, now fully operational, on time and under budget

evidence_refs.source_quote: the Third Track which was commissioned a few months back and is now fully operational, on time and under budget

payload.description: Work to finish first phase of Jamaica Capacity Improvements to deal with the 'Jamaica crawl' and speed up service

evidence_refs.source_quote: the work they are doing to finish up the first phase of the Jamaica Capacity Improvements
This will support Jamaica Capacity Improvements

payload.description: ESA readiness project providing train storage and operational flexibility in support of new service to Grand Central Madison

evidence_refs.source_quote: Work on the Great Neck Pocket Track roared along in October towards the November signal cutover. The new track is an ESA readiness project designed to provide much needed train storage and operational flexibility in support of the new service to GCM.

payload.description: 15 month Bellerose Ladder installation project - a series of switches enabling trains to cross quickly over several tracks, culminating with October 29 and 30 signal cutover

evidence_refs.source_quote: the 15 month Bellerose Ladder installation project, culminating with the October 29 and 30 signal cutover and subsequent testing
a 'ladder' is basically a series of switches that enables trains to cross quickly

issues: evidence_refs[1].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.description: New LIRR terminal station - 700,000 square foot terminal with a 3.5 mile tunnel, many times larger than existing Grand Central Terminal

evidence_refs.source_quote: GCM is not a concourse alone but is a 3½ mile tunnel... a 700,000 square foot terminal station with the tunnel to Queens attached to it
increasing peak service by 40% and off-peak service by 65%

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.description: 15 month Bellerose Ladder installation project - a series of switches enabling trains to cross quickly over several tracks

evidence_refs.source_quote: the 15 month Bellerose Ladder installation project, culminating with the October 29 and 30 signal cutover and subsequent testing

payload.description: New LIRR terminal station - 700,000 square foot terminal with a 3.5 mile tunnel, many times larger than existing Grand Central Terminal

evidence_refs.source_quote: President Torres Springer noted that GCM is not a concourse alone but is a 3½ mile tunnel.
increasing peak service by 40% and off-peak service by 65%

payload.description: Metro-North systemwide October on-time performance

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North's systemwide October on-time performance ("OTP") was 96.2%, which was above goal of 94%

payload.description: FRA reportable customer injury rate

evidence_refs.source_quote: For the 12 month period ending September 2022, the FRA reportable customer injury rate was 2.18 per one million customers, which was up from 2.03 for the prior 12 month reporting period ending September 2021

payload.description: Regular meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Committees

evidence_refs.source_quote: Minutes of the Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Committees Tuesday, November 29, 2022
Meeting held at 2 Broadway – 20 th Floor New York, New York 10004 9:30 am

tool_args.label: FRA Grants PTC Waiver for GCM Opening

payload.description: FRA granted temporary waiver allowing LIRR to use existing on-board PTC software for opening day while updated PTC software is being uploaded to the fleet

evidence_refs.source_quote: last Friday, they received the good news that FRA had granted its request for a temporary waiver, allowing LIRR to use its existing on-board PTC software for opening day while updated PTC software is being uploaded to the fleet

payload.description: 200 volunteers tested the functionality of Grand Central Madison as part of a station operations exercise, navigating the concourse and making notes on travel paths, signage, and wayfinding

evidence_refs.source_quote: On Sunday, November 13, some 200 volunteers tested the functionality of GCM as part of a station operations exercise in which they navigated the concourse and made notes on travel paths throughout the terminal, signage, and general wayfinding elements

payload.description: FRA-mandated annual readiness drill in New Haven simulating a fire scenario on Amtrak Acela equipment operating through Metro-North territory

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North's Office of System Safety conducted its own FRA-mandated annual readiness drill in New Haven on November 5. This year's exercise simulated a fire scenario on Amtrak Acela equipment operating through Metro-North territory
Amtrak (which provided the Acela equipment and fully participated), the New Haven Fire Department, MTAPD

warnings: event.participants is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Participant lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: has_participant.

payload.description: Signal cutover for the Bellerose Ladder installation project

evidence_refs.source_quote: the 15 month Bellerose Ladder installation project, culminating with the October 29 and 30 signal cutover and subsequent testing

payload.description: ISBeRG (International Suburban Rail Benchmarking Group) end-of-year conference hosted by Metro-North and LIRR at Metro-North's Operations Training Center in GCT

evidence_refs.source_quote: the week of November 14, when Metro-North and LIRR proudly served host to ISBeRG's end-of-year conference
delegates from, among others, London, Munich, Barcelona, Oslo, Copenhagen, San Francisco, Hong Kong, São Paulo, Brazil, and Melbourne, Australia

warnings: event.participants is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Participant lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: has_participant.

tool_args.label: Metro-North President's and Team Excellence Awards

payload.description: Metro-North held its annual President's and Team Excellence Awards, honoring four individual employees and two employee teams

evidence_refs.source_quote: on November 10, Metro-North held its annual President's and Team Excellence Awards in which Metro-North proudly honored four individual employees for dedication well above and beyond, as well as two outstanding employee teams

payload.description: Switch work at Valley Interlocking, where buses will replace train service overnight for eight hours

evidence_refs.source_quote: On December 6-8, LIRR will have switch work at Valley Interlocking, where buses will replace train service overnight for eight hours

payload.claim_text: LIRR service will be transformed by the service increases made possible by GCM, increasing peak service by 40% and off-peak service by 65%
payload.subject: LIRR service to Grand Central Madison

evidence_refs.source_quote: increasing peak service by 40% and off-peak service by 65%

tool_args.label: New Haven Line Substation Circuit Breaker Replacement

payload.description: Five year contract for new and/or refurbishment of circuit breakers and testing within seven substations on Metro-North's New Haven Line to ensure safe and uninterrupted train service and extend substation life by 15 years
payload.locations: seven substations on Metro-North's New Haven Line

locations_normalized.raw_text: seven substations on Metro-North's New Haven Line

evidence_refs.source_quote: Approval was requested to award a five year non-competitive estimated quantities contract in the amount of $3,872,640 to Powell Electric Systems, Inc. ("Powell") for new and/or for refurbishment of original equipment manufacturers circuit breakers and testing within seven substations on Metro-North's New Haven Line
extend the useful life of the seven substations by an estimated 15 years

payload.description: Switch work in Jamaica. Bus service will replace westbound train service at Queens Village and Hollis. This will support Jamaica Capacity Improvements.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On the weekends of December 10-11 and 17-18, there will be switch work in Jamaica. Bus service will replace westbound train service at Queens Village and Hollis. This will support Jamaica Capacity Improvements.
